channel.title: Sony on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Sony on MinWeb

item.title: Sony Increases PS5 and Pro Prices: What You Need to Know
item.description:
If you’ve been waiting for the “right time” to buy a PlayStation 5—hoping for a discount or a standard price drop as the console aged—you’re likely feeling a massive sense of whiplash today. We were raised on the golden rule of consumer electronics: gadgets get cheaper the longer they sit on the shelf. You wait a year, the price dips. You wait two years, you get a bundle deal.

In 2026, that rule has been completely shredded.

item.title: Spider-Man: New Trailer Secrets
item.description:
The Spider-Man: Brand New Day Trailer Is Finally Here - Here’s Everything We Caught

The Spider-Man: Brand New Day trailer dropped.

And like millions of other fans, you probably immediately hit replay about five times, paused to dissect every frame, then went online to see what everyone else was thinking.

If you’re anything like the folks on Reddit (where the trailer reaction threads are blowing up), you’ve got questions—lots of questions. Who’s that mysterious narrator? What’s happening to Peter’s powers? And seriously, who in the world is Sadie Sink playing?
